statusLine.command: bash -c 'if git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); if [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/git-header.sh" ]; then exec "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/git-header.sh" --status-only; fi; fi; if [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/git-header.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/hooks/git-header.sh" --status-only; fi'
